listings.name: Love's Travel Stop #368
listings.description: Love's Travel Stop #368 on I-65 at Exit 208 in Clanton. 24-hour travel center with diesel, DEF, multiple diesel lanes, showers, Arby's restaurant, and dedicated truck parking. Co-located with a CAT Scale and a Love's Truck Care service center (listed separately).
listings.corroboration: Address 300 Arby Dr, Exit 208, phone 205-755-8104 consistent across Love's official store page, truckstopsandservices, findtruckservice and mystore411. Truck-space count left blank due to source conflict (official Love's page cites ~65; other directories cite 80). ZIP cited as both 35045 (Love's/mystore411) and 35046 (Yelp/directories).

listings.name: CAT Scale at Love's #368
listings.description: Certified CAT Scale located on the lot of Love's Travel Stop #368, I-65 Exit 208, Clanton. Weigh service via 1-877-CAT-SCALE / Weigh My Truck app.
listings.corroboration: CAT Scale presence at the Clanton Love's (I-65 & CR 28, Exit 208) confirmed by CAT Scale locator references, truckstopsandservices CAT directory, allstays AL CAT list, and findtruckservice Love's #368 amenity list. catscale.com official locator returned HTTP 403 to automated fetch but the location is corroborated by >=3 independent sources.

listings.name: Love's Truck Care #368
listings.description: Love's Truck Care service center co-located at Love's Travel Stop #368, I-65 Exit 208, Clanton. Commercial tire sales/service (Hankook, Bridgestone, Michelin, Goodyear, Yokohama, Love's Retreads), oil change / PM, light mechanical, and roadside assistance.
listings.corroboration: On-site Love's Truck Care at 300 Arby Dr confirmed by Yelp (Love's Truck Care Clanton), findtruckservice (Love's Truck Care #368), Bridgestone/BFGoodrich commercial dealer locator, and 4roadservice. Categorized as Tire Repair given confirmed commercial tire service; also performs mechanical/PM/roadside.

listings.name: Jemison Exxon
listings.description: Independent 24-hour truck stop on I-65 at Exit 219 (Jemison/Thorsby). 24-hour diesel, convenience store, Subway deli, truckers lounge, showers, reefer plug-ins, RV/truck parking on a lighted, paved lot.
listings.corroboration: Existence, Exit 219, phone 205-688-1022, 24-hr diesel, ~50 truck spaces and showers confirmed by truckstopsandservices, iExit, findfuelstops, findtruckservice, allstays and poidirectory. Street number cited mostly as 12820 County Road 42 (iExit/truckstopsandservices/findtruckservice); findfuelstops cites 12914 County Road 42 - minor discrepancy.

listings.name: Texaco / Shop N Fill (Verbena)
listings.description: Independent fuel stop / convenience store on I-65 at Exit 200 (Verbena) reported with 24-hour self-service fuel, store/deli, and truck parking.
listings.hold_reason: Small independent station; existence and Exit 200 location confirmed (truckstopsandservices, iExit, Alabama interstate logos, roadnow), but truck-parking availability/overnight status, truck-space count, and truck-stop category-fit are not independently corroborated (truck-parking claim is essentially single-source).
listings.corroboration: Location at 6211 County Road 59, Verbena, Exit 200 corroborated by truckstopsandservices, iExit and Alabama (interstatelogos) official highway-logo listing. Phone 205-755-9776 from truckstopsandservices summary. Held pending confirmation of truck access/parking.

listings.name: Entec Station #105
listings.description: Truck-friendly fuel stop on I-65 at Exit 181 (Millbrook) reported with diesel lanes, restrooms, ATM and a small amount of truck parking. No CAT scale.
listings.hold_reason: Small independent fuel stop (reported ~5 truck spaces). Existence and Exit 181/Millbrook location appear in TruckMap, iExit and yellowpages, but no confirmed street address or phone, and truck-parking/overnight status and truck-stop category-fit are not independently confirmed.
listings.corroboration: Entec Station #105 at I-65 Exit 181, Millbrook 36054 listed in TruckMap and iExit with diesel and limited truck parking; yellowpages confirms an Entec station in Millbrook. Held pending address/phone and truck-access confirmation.

listings.name: Days Inn by Wyndham Clanton
listings.description: Days Inn by Wyndham at I-65 Exit 205 in Clanton. Pet-friendly hotel with free breakfast, Wi-Fi and pool; reported to offer a small number of truck-size parking spaces.
listings.hold_reason: Hotel identity, address (2000 Big M Blvd) and Exit 205 confirmed via Wyndham official page, allstays and hotelplanner, but truck/large-vehicle parking availability is only reported by a single truck directory (truckstopsandservices) and cannot be independently confirmed; hotel truck parking changes frequently.
listings.corroboration: Days Inn by Wyndham Clanton at 2000 Big M Blvd, Exit 205, phone 205-755-2420 confirmed by Wyndham official site, allstays and hotelplanner. Truck-parking claim (~3 spaces) is single-source; held for verification.

excluded.name: Love's Travel Stop #718
excluded.reason: Real Love's location but at I-65 Exit 158 in Hope Hull, south of Montgomery - outside seg5 range (exits 179-228).

excluded.name: Reported 'Love's Truck Care / Speedco, 1408 S Memorial Dr, Prattville'
excluded.reason: Could not verify; no Love's Truck Care or Speedco confirmed in Prattville. Address appears to be an unverified/AI-summary artifact. Nearest confirmed Love's Truck Care is Clanton (Exit 208). Excluded to avoid fabrication.

excluded.name: I-65 Alabama weigh station (Autauga/Chilton County)
excluded.reason: No permanent scale house or weigh station could be confirmed on I-65 within exits 179-228. Alabama uses weigh-in-motion sites (e.g., Athens far north) and permanent scales elsewhere; nothing in-segment verifiable via ALDOT/coopsareopen/directories.

excluded.name: Semi truck washes (151 Truck Wash / Hanceville washouts)
excluded.reason: Nearest semi truck-wash results are in central Montgomery (401 Paul Rd) and Hanceville (I-65 Exit 291) - not confidently within the seg5 corridor (exits 179-228). No truck wash confirmed in Jemison/Clanton/Prattville/Millbrook.

excluded.name: TruckParkingClub private lots (Prattville)
excluded.reason: App-reserved private parking listings, not verifiable public freight facilities; excluded.
